html:div.html:p: This library defines context-independent elements for Hepatitis A used throughout the Immunization CPG

html:tr.html:th: Hepatitis A Doses Administered to Patient
Hepatitis A Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient
Number of Hepatitis A Primary Series Doses Administered
Client's age is less than 12 months
No hepatitis A primary series doses were administered
Client's age is more than or equal to 12 months
One hepatitis A primary series dose was administered
Date of Latest Hepatitis A Dose
The latest Hepatitis A dose was administered less than 6 months ago
The latest Hepatitis A dose was administered more than 6 months ago
Two hepatitis A primary series doses were administered
No hepatitis A primary series dose was administered
Client's age is less than 18 months
Client's age is more than or equal to 18 months
Live vaccine was administered in the last 4 weeks
No live vaccine was administered in the last 4 weeks

description.value: This library defines context-independent elements for Hepatitis A used throughout the Immunization CPG
